calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Dan Irish?S Motion To Compel Blaine Schanfeldt?S Responses To Requests For Special Interrogatories, Set No. 1; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $510.00
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT DAN IRISH' Motion To Compel Blaine Schanfeldt?S Responses To Requests For Special Interrogatories, Set No. 1; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $510.00.

Defendant Dan Irish's motion to compel responses to his first set of special interrogatories and for monetary sanctions is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Plaintiff Blaine Schanfeldt must serve verified code-compliant responses without objections to Mr. Irish's first set of special interrogatories and pay reasonable monetary sanctions of $360 (one hour at a reasonable rate of $300 plus $60 in costs) no later than September 5, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Dan Irishs Motion To Compel Blaine Schanfeldts Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents, Set No. 2; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $510.00
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT DAN IRISH' Motion To Compel Blaine Schanfeldts Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents, Set No. 2; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $510.00.

Defendant Dan Irish's motion to compel responses to his second set of document requests and for monetary sanctions is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Plaintiff Blaine Schanfeldt must serve verified code-compliant responses without objections to Mr. Irish's second set of document requests, produce all responsive documents, and pay reasonable monetary sanctions of $360 (one hour at a reasonable rate of $300 plus $60 in costs) no later than September 12, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
